name: Wirken: tool output redacted by egress hook
message:
An egress hook replaced or refused bytes from a tool's output before the bytes entered the LLM conversation.

Detection: tool_output_redacted (8)
Severity baseline: medium

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session_id, @wirken.event.agent_id, @wirken.event.adapter_id, @wirken.event.sender_id, @wirken.event.call_id, @wirken.event.hook_id, @wirken.event.reason, @wirken.event.original_sha256, @wirken.event.original_size, @wirken.event.redacted_sha256, @wirken.event.redacted_size.

Plaintext is not on the chain by design; @wirken.event.original_sha256 is the only on-chain reference to the bytes the tool produced.

@security-team
